JSyn      ----     Java Audio Synthesis API

Demos

Berliner

Written at ICMC 2000 in Berlin. SynthTables are loaded with various samples. The tables are scanned with a slow triangle wave modulated by a fast sine wave.

WebDrum

The WebDrum is a collaborative drum performance Applet. Communication between performers is through the TransJam server.

FMLab

A simple 4 operator FM editor. Voices can be played using the ASCII keyboard. Designed to teach FM synthesis.

 [TOP]  [PREVIOUS]  [NEXT]

Visit the JSyn or SoftSynth home pages.
